leadText: Spacial Rend (Japanese: あくうせつだん Subspace Tear) is a damage-dealing Dragon-type move introduced in Generation IV. It is the signature move of Palkia.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 Generations IV to VII 1.2 Generation VIII onwards 1.2.1 Pokémon Legends: Arceus Effect [ edit | edit source ] Generations IV to VII [ edit | edit source ] Spacial Rend deals damage and has an increased critical hit ratio. Spacial Rend can also be used as part of a Contest Spectacular combination , with the user gaining extra three appeal points if the move Focus Energy was used in the prior turn. Generation VIII onwards [ edit | edit source ] In Versions 1.0 to 1.2.1 of Pokémon Sword and Shield , Spacial Rend could not be selected in a battle. Starting with Version 1.3.0, it is usable and functions the same as it did in previous generations. In Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl , it can be selected and functions as it did in previous generations. Pokémon Legends: Arceus [ edit | edit source ] Spacial Rend's base power was reduced to 90. If used by Origin Forme Palkia, Spacial Rend's animation, base power, accuracy, and critical-hit ratio are changed. Pokémon Legends: Arceus Category Special PP 5 Agile Strong Power 90 75 110 Accuracy 95% 95% 100% Action speed modifier Self 0 0 +5 Target 0 +3 0 Additional effect Crit. stage +1 +1 +2 ? ? ? ? Has a high critical-hit ratio Origin Forme Pokémon Legends: Arceus Category Special PP 5 Agile Strong Power 80 65 100 Accuracy 85% 85% 95% Action speed modifier Self 0 0 +5 Target 0 +3 0 Additional effect Crit. stage +2 +2 +3 ? ? ? ? Has a very high critical-hit ratio

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description D P Pt HG SS PBR The user tears the foe along with the space around it. This move has a high critical-hit ratio. B W B2 W2 X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP The user tears the target along with the space around it. Critical hits land more easily. LA S V The user tears the target along with the space around it. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD T D S Inflicts damage on all enemies in the room. It has a high critical-hit rate. B S L おなじへやの てきポケモンに ダメージをあたえる きゅうしょに あたりやすい MD GtI UNUSED S MD It damages enemies in the same room. It has a high critical-hit rate.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] When used in strong style by Origin Forme Palkia , Spacial Rend has the highest base critical hit rate of all moves, at +3. Spacial Rend is the only signature move of the Pokémon of myth that has its base power reduced when used by one of the member's Origin Formes. In Pokémon Legends: Arceus , Palkia's Spacial Rend animation changes depending if it's on its standard or Origin Forme. During Origin Forme Palkia and Arceus 's boss battles in Pokémon Legends: Arceus, both can use a charged, undodgeable version of Spacial Rend, but this attack can be cancelled by hitting them with Space and Mysterious Balms respectively, eventually stunning them.
